final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept; Asset type: boot splash image for Orbwalker; Primary request: production candidate boot splash screen image for a fantasy match-3 roguelike. Scene/backdrop: dark stone vault doorway opening to a glowing elemental orb constellation, subtle treasure glints, calm dramatic composition. Subject: brand mood image only, no UI, no text. Style/medium: polished stylized 2D splash art, clean and cinematic. Composition/framing: 16:9 wide splash screen with centered focal glow and enough negative space for engine fade/logo overlay later. Lighting/mood: mysterious, premium, magical, quick-loading screen feel. Color palette: dark stone, gold, cyan, red, green, violet elemental accents. Constraints: no readable text, no logo, no watermark, no characters, no UI controls, no casino imagery, no gore.
